# AgentRune

> Mobile command center for AI coding agents. Control Claude Code, Aider, Codex & more from your phone.

## What AgentRune Does
- Launch and monitor AI coding agents remotely from your phone
- Supports Claude Code, Aider, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Cline, and Cursor Agent
- Real-time terminal output streaming over WebSocket
- Schedule automated agent tasks with cron-style automation
- Built-in Git panel for reviewing changes, staging, and committing
- Voice input for hands-free agent control
- Agents use AgentLore MCP for verified knowledge access

## Who It's For
- Developers who want to run AI agents on their PC while away from the desk
- Teams managing multiple AI coding agents across projects
- Anyone who wants a mobile-first interface for AI-assisted development

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Capacitor (Android)
- Backend: Node.js CLI server with PTY-based process management
- Connection: WebSocket (LAN) + Cloudflare Tunnel (remote)

## Install
- Android APK: Download from GitHub Releases
- CLI: npx agentrune start

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/Kujirafu/AgentRune
- Releases: https://github.com/Kujirafu/AgentRune/releases
- AgentLore (knowledge backend): https://agentlore.vercel.app
